decisions.title: Initial toolchain selection
decisions.impact: Selected 18 engineering tools + 92 total tools in registry

decisions.title: Enterprise runtime directory structure
decisions.impact: Created enterprise/runtime/ as single source of truth

decisions.title: AI Role system and tool routing
decisions.impact: Defined 7 AI roles, 10 tool routes, 22 quality gates

decisions.title: Master registry unification
decisions.impact: Unified all tool registries into master-registry.json (110 tools, 95% coverage)

decisions.title: Enterprise Tool Router (decision trees)
decisions.impact: Built 10 decision trees (A-J) + enterprise tree (Z) for automatic tool routing

decisions.title: Expanded AI Roles to 14
decisions.impact: Expanded from 7 to 14 roles with dedicated tools and quality gates

decisions.title: Knowledge Graph architecture
decisions.impact: Mapped all project layers, dependencies, APIs, DB, UI, workflows, events

decisions.title: MCP server installations
decisions.impact: Added 5 MCP servers (Memory, SQLite, Git, OpenAPI, SequentialThinking)

decisions.title: Missing tool remediation
decisions.impact: Installed semgrep, trufflehog, gitleaks, mkdocs, mkdocs-material; confirmed mermaid-cli, k6 pre-installed

tasks.description: AI Operating System Bootstrap (110 tools, 95% certified, 14 roles, 11 decision trees)
Enterprise AI Integration & Autonomous Orchestration — Step 1-6: Intelligence Layer, Dependency Graph, Selection Engine, Task Planner
Enterprise AI Integration & Autonomous Orchestration — Step 7-12: Decision Engine, Orchestrator, Validation Engine, Self Learning, Dashboard, API Contracts
Enterprise AI Integration & Autonomous Orchestration — Step 13-14: Registry updates, full certification
Gap remediation: Graphviz PATH, 3 missing tools, MkDocs site, docker-compose, ADR-017

decisions_phase04_gap_remediation.title: Gap remediation — Phase 04 closure
decisions_phase04_gap_remediation.impact: Fixed Graphviz PATH (v15.1.0 accessible), installed bundle-wizard v1.6.1 + ts-prune + redocly v2.39.0, created MkDocs project site (4 pages, builds clean), created docker-compose.yml for monitoring stack (Prometheus+Grafana+Jaeger), updated CERT-004 from null to 94.5 CERTIFIED

decisions_phase04.title: AI Decision Engine architecture
decisions_phase04.impact: Created TOOL_DECISION_ENGINE.md — autonomous decision pipeline with 9 rules (classification, role selection, tool chain, execution order, MCP routing, validation, documentation, certification, reporting)

decisions_phase04.title: Runtime Orchestrator state machine
decisions_phase04.impact: Created RUNTIME_ORCHESTRATOR.md — task lifecycle with 7 states (PENDING, QUEUED, RUNNING, SUCCESS, FAIL, HALTED, ROLLED_BACK), priority queue, parallel pool, retry with backoff, rollback manager

decisions_phase04.title: 12-domain Validation Engine
decisions_phase04.impact: Created VALIDATION_ENGINE.md — 12 validation domains with BLOCKER/HIGH/MEDIUM severity, per-domain gates, pass/fail criteria, automated gate execution commands

decisions_phase04.title: Self Learning Layer with feedback loop
decisions_phase04.impact: Created SELF_LEARNING.md — execution recorder, pattern analyzer, insight generator, score/threshold adjustment algorithms, 5-level maturity model (currently Level 2)

decisions_phase04.title: 10 Runtime API Contracts
decisions_phase04.impact: Created RUNTIME_API_CONTRACTS.md — 10 internal APIs (Tool, Execution, Certification, Validation, Knowledge, Memory, Planning, Decision, Monitoring, Automation) with full request/response schemas and error handling
